overall.description: A first-person cockpit view from a sci-fi vehicle (Star Citizen) waiting at a security barrier outside a medical facility. The barrier retracts and the vehicle slowly drives forward into the facility entrance. The environment features neon lighting, industrial metal architecture, and holographic UI elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi medical facility docking bay with security barrier

events.description: orange striped security barrier retracts upward into the ceiling structure

agents.ego_description: stationary in vehicle cockpit waiting for security barrier to open at medical facility entrance

entered.detail: retractable barrier with orange and black diagonal stripes blocking the path forward
illuminated green medical cross symbol mounted above the facility entrance
red glowing warning lights on tall industrial poles flanking the entrance
large industrial archway leading into the medical facility interior
metal paneled wall with pipes and industrial detailing
metal paneled wall with staircases and platform structures

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits stationary at a closed security barrier in a sci-fi medical facility docking bay. Orange and black striped bars block the path forward while red warning beacons glow on either side. The green medical cross sign is visible above the entrance archway in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching medical facility interior through opened security gate

events.description: vehicle begins moving forward slowly through the now-opened security barrier
passing under the facility entrance arch into the deeper interior corridor

agents.ego_description: piloting the vehicle forward through the security gate toward the medical facility entrance at slow speed

entered.detail: darker interior passage visible beyond the entrance archway with distant lighting

segments.scene_description: The security barrier retracts completely and the vehicle begins moving forward through the entrance. The medical cross sign and facility archway grow larger as the vehicle approaches, passing from the docking bay into the interior corridor. The industrial walls close in as the vehicle advances toward the facility interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from a stationary wait at a security checkpoint to a slow advance into a sci-fi medical facility. It begins held at a standstill behind a closed security barrier marked by orange and black striped bars and glowing red warning beacons. As the barrier retracts, the vehicle begins to move forward, causing the distant green medical cross and the facility's archway to grow larger in the frame. The scene then shifts from the open docking bay into the interior corridor, where the industrial walls close in around the vehicle as it penetrates deeper into the facility.
